overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character traversing a rain-soaked, neon-drenched Night City street at night. The character transitions from walking to running through covered walkways and open plazas, surrounded by towering skyscrapers adorned with holographic advertisements and atmospheric lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated city sidewalk alongside multi-lane road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet orange-tiled sidewalk, approaching the covered overpass ahead

entered.detail: tall building with blue and cyan neon signage and illuminated windows
tall building with vertical pink neon strips and multiple billboards
illuminated advertising kiosk displaying a character portrait
large curved metal transit structure spanning across the road ahead
tall pole with multiple bright lamps illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-slicked elevated sidewalk beside a busy city street, flanked by towering neon-lit skyscrapers. Digital billboards and streetlights illuminate the path ahead toward a large covered overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under transit overpass

events.description: enters the covered overpass area with red neon accent lighting on structural beams
transitions from walking to a steady running pace

agents.ego_description: jogging forward under the overpass, pace increases from walking to running while navigating the covered path

entered.detail: red illuminated structural beams and supports of the overpass
large screen displaying a white sports car advertisement

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered overpass section with prominent red neon structural lighting, transitioning from a walk to a run. The environment becomes more enclosed as the sky is obscured by the overhead transit structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with commercial displays approaching Japantown

events.description: companion NPC joins and runs alongside the character

agents.ego_description: running alongside a female companion through the covered walkway, maintaining steady pace toward the district exit

notable_agents.action: female jogger in purple leggings and red top running alongside the ego character

entered.detail: rack with colorful publications and items displayed for sale
red and white Japantown directional sign

segments.scene_description: The character runs through the covered walkway accompanied by a female jogger, passing a magazine stand and approaching the Japantown district. The path remains sheltered under the overpass structure with continuous neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban plaza and intersection in Japantown

events.description: exits covered walkway into open plaza intersection with tall buildings surrounding
character deploys a black umbrella while crossing the open area

agents.ego_description: crossing the expansive open plaza intersection while holding an umbrella, looking around at the surrounding architecture

entered.detail: wide open concrete plaza with yellow crosswalk markings and red boundary lines
distinctive cylindrical skyscraper with circular signage and teal lighting
black umbrella deployed by the character for rain protection

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the covered walkway into a vast open plaza intersection in Japantown, deploying an umbrella as they cross the expansive concrete area. The environment opens up to reveal towering cylindrical skyscrapers and wide street crossings under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban corridor that transitions from a narrow neon street into a vast, open city plaza. It begins with the character walking along a rain-slicked elevated sidewalk flanked by towering skyscrapers and glowing digital billboards. As the camera moves forward, the environment becomes more enclosed when the character enters a covered overpass illuminated by prominent red neon lighting and shifts from a walk to a run. The scene continues through this sheltered walkway, passing a magazine stand and a fellow jogger, before the path finally opens up. The camera then emerges from the structure into a wide Japantown intersection, where the character deploys an umbrella while crossing an expansive concrete plaza surrounded by towering cylindrical skyscrapers.
